creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2009-11-28 20:30:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio                Makefile 
  Added files:
    audio/ario           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    audio/ario/files     patch-po-Makefile 
  Log:
  Ario is a GTK2 client for MPD (Music player daemon). The interface used to
  browse the library is inspired by Rhythmbox but Ario aims to be much lighter
  and faster.
  
  WWW: http://ario-player.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/139414
  Submitted by:   Grzegorz Blach <magik at roorback.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1077    +1 -0      ports/audio/Makefile
  1.1       +41 -0     ports/audio/ario/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/ario/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/audio/ario/files/patch-po-Makefile (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/audio/ario/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +125 -0    ports/audio/ario/pkg-plist (new)
